title: RE: Accuvest Appeals Commission’s Final Decision
text:
Thursday June 9, 2011
APPEAL OF THE COMMISSION’S FINAL DECISION
RE:
THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF THE SECURITIES COMMISSION OF THE BAHAMAS
Plaintiff/Respondent
VS
ACCUVEST FUNDS SERVICES LIMITED AND SOUTH AMERICAN INVESTMENT FUND LIMITED
Defendants/Appellants
The Public is hereby advised that the Hearing Panel of the Securities Commission of The
Bahamas, issued a final decision against the referenced Defendant/Appellants, dated March 29,
2011.
The Public is further advised that the defendants have appealed the final decision pursuant to
s. 42 of the Securities Industry Act, 1999, the appeal having been filed in the Supreme Court on
April 28, 2011. Presently, the Commission awaits the hearing of this matter and will further
advise the public on the outcome.
The Commission takes this opportunity to inform the Public that its disciplinary process
culminates with the Hearing Panel which issues the final decisions in all of the Commission’s
administrative actions. Such decisions may be appealed to the Supreme Court, although the
appeal does not stay any sanctions imposed on a registrant. The Commission has sought in the
interest of fairness to ensure that the public is aware when a matter, such as the present one
involving the defendants, is being appealed.
Any further questions on the Commission’s disciplinary process should be directed to:
Office of Legal Counsel
Securities Commission of The Bahamas
3rd Floor, Charlotte House,
Shirley & Charlotte Streets
P.O. Box N 8347, Nassau, Bahamas
Tel (242) 356-6291
Fax (242) 356-7530
Email: info@scb.gov.bs
